'''navunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:deadhandedness|deadhandedness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-v-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deadhandedness|deadhandedness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| navunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nævinith|nævinith]] || [[word:nævinij|nævinij]] || [[word:nævinish|nævinish]] || [[word:nævini|nævini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:navuvunuth|navuvunuth]] || [[word:navuvunuj|navuvunuj]] || [[word:navuvunush|navuvunush]] || [[word:navuvunu|navuvunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:navunuth|navunuth]] || [[word:navunuj|navunuj]] || [[word:navunush|navunush]] || [[word:navunu|navunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:navufnuth|navufnuth]] || [[word:navufnuj|navufnuj]] || [[word:navufnush|navufnush]] || [[word:navufnuf|navufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:navunuthu|navunuthu]] || [[word:navunuju|navunuju]] || [[word:navunushu|navunushu]] || [[word:navunuku|navunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:navunuth|navunuth]] || [[word:navunuj|navunuj]] || [[word:navunush|navunush]] || [[word:navunu|navunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:navunuthul|navunuthul]] || [[word:navunujul|navunujul]] || [[word:navunushul|navunushul]] || [[word:navunukul|navunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:navunuthuthu|navunuthuthu]] || [[word:navunujuju|navunujuju]] || [[word:navunushushu|navunushushu]] || [[word:navunuku|navunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:navunuthun|navunuthun]] || [[word:navunujun|navunujun]] || [[word:navunushun|navunushun]] || [[word:navunukun|navunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:navunuthuoro|navunuthuoro]] || [[word:navunujuoro|navunujuoro]] || [[word:navunushuoro|navunushuoro]] || [[word:navunukuoro|navunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
